Hero.headline: Build the Future of Work <accent>with AI</accent>
Hero.subheadline: Products, Processes, and People — powered for the AI era
Hero.description: AI is not just a technology, it's a way of working. Processware AI connects solutions, processes, and people for the AI era.

ThreePillars.title: Three Pillars of AI Transformation
ThreePillars.subtitle: A complete framework for bringing AI into your organization
ThreePillars.peopleDesc: Enable teams to work with AI effectively

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Practical AI services designed for real business impact
Services.aiSolutionsDesc: Custom AI-powered products tailored to your domain — from intelligent automation to decision support systems.
Services.processConsultingDesc: Redesign operational workflows with AI at the core — for compliance, efficiency, and scalability.
Services.aiTrainingDesc: Structured capability-building programs to empower your teams to work confidently with AI tools.
Services.platformDevDesc: End-to-end development of AI-integrated platforms — built for performance, security, and scale.

AIAdvisor.title: AI Advisor
AIAdvisor.subtitle: Answer three quick questions and we'll recommend the best starting point for your AI journey.
AIAdvisor.q3: What type of organization are you?
AIAdvisor.resultProduct: Your organization is best positioned to benefit from AI-powered product solutions — intelligent automation, smart tools, and purpose-built AI applications that deliver immediate value.
AIAdvisor.resultProcess: Your organization is likely to benefit most from structured process transformation and compliance-oriented operational design powered by AI.
AIAdvisor.resultPeople: Your greatest opportunity lies in empowering your teams with AI skills and structured capability building — turning your people into confident AI practitioners.

CTA.title: Start Building with <accent>AI</accent>
CTA.description: Turn AI into real work in your organization.

Contact.subtitle: Ready to explore what AI can do for your organization? Let's talk.
